payload.limits: from Riverside Drive to FDR Drive
payload.description: Major transit corridor hosting M79-SBS, connecting to 4 subway lines and 16 bus routes
Crosstown bus on 79th Street from Riverside Drive to FDR Drive, 13,500 daily riders
Launched M79 Select Bus Service to replace M79 Local, included bus queue jump lanes, bus lanes, signal timing, off-board fare payment, real-time passenger info, bus stop amenities
Capital improvements for 79th Street from Riverside Drive to FDR Drive including bus stop upgrades, sidewalk extensions, pedestrian refuges, street trees

payload.description: 8 bus queue jump lanes installed as part of 2017 Street Improvement Project

Off-board fare payment installed as part of 2017 Street Improvement Project

Bus stop amenities and street furniture installed as part of 2017 Street Improvement Project

Upgrade 14 bus pads as part of 79th Street Crosstown SBS Capital Project
Upgrade 9 median tips/pedestrian refuges as part of 79th Street Crosstown SBS Capital Project
Add 4 bus bulbs as part of 79th Street Crosstown SBS Capital Project

Add 20+ street trees as part of 79th Street Crosstown SBS Capital Project
